title: FeedoZone
subtitle: Hyperlocal Food Delivery Platform
tagline: Solving food delivery for rural & semi-urban India
description: FeedoZone is a hyperlocal food delivery startup built to solve real food delivery problems in rural and semi-urban India. As a solo founder, I handled everything from product strategy and full-stack development to operations, vendor onboarding, and marketing.
problem: Rural and semi-urban areas in India lack reliable food delivery infrastructure. Existing platforms like Swiggy and Zomato don't serve these markets, leaving millions of students, hostel residents, and working professionals without access to convenient food ordering.
solution: FeedoZone is a hyperlocal food delivery platform that connects local restaurants and home kitchens with customers in underserved areas. By focusing on small towns and college towns, we solve last-mile delivery where giants won't go.
businessModel: Commission-based model where FeedoZone earns a percentage on each order. Additional revenue streams include featured listings for restaurants and delivery subscription plans for heavy users.
founderStory: I noticed that my fellow students and hostel residents in Warananagar had no reliable food delivery option. The big apps didn't serve us. So I decided to build one myself — from scratch, alone. FeedoZone is the result of that frustration turned into execution.
roadmap: Launch Android & iOS apps on stores

title: JalNetra
subtitle: IoT Smart Water Monitoring System
tagline: Real-time water monitoring powered by IoT & Firebase
description: JalNetra is an IoT-enabled smart water monitoring system designed to improve water conservation and optimize resource utilization through real-time data collection, automated alerting, and actionable analytics.
problem: Water wastage due to lack of real-time monitoring and automated alerts in residential and institutional settings leads to significant resource loss and increased utility costs.
solution: JalNetra deploys IoT sensors to continuously monitor water parameters, pushes data to Firebase in real-time, and provides a web dashboard for tracking usage patterns, triggering alerts, and generating conservation insights.
